name: Chicken Tonnata D'este (Italian)
recipeIngredient: 1 can water packed tuna (7 ounce), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 cups chicken stock to a boil in a covered saucepan.
2. Poach the chicken breasts for 15 minutes, then allow them to cool in the stock.
3. For the tonnato sauce, combine mayonnaise, wine, 1/2 cup stock, anchovies, oil from anchovies, tuna, lemon juice, and oregano in a blender or food processor. Blend until well mixed.
4. Season the sauce with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Remove bones from the chicken breasts and cut the meat into 1/2 inch thick slices.
6. Arrange the sliced chicken on a serving platter, allowing them to overlap slightly.
7. Pour the tonnato sauce over all the pieces of chicken.
8. Sprinkle capers and chopped parsley on top, then garnish with lemon slices.
9. Serve cold or at room temperature.
